title: Borrowing Stationery 借文具
scene: 上课时Tom发现自己没带尺子，向同桌借。

lines.en: Lily, do you have a ruler? I forgot to bring mine.
lines.zh: 莉莉，你有尺子吗？我忘带我的了。

lines.en: Yes, I have two. You can use this one.
lines.zh: 有的，我有两把。你可以用这把。

lines.en: Thank you! I also need a pair of scissors.
lines.zh: 谢谢！我还需要一把剪刀。

lines.en: Sorry, I don't have scissors today.
That's OK. Can I use your glue stick then?
lines.zh: 没关系。那我能用你的胶棒吗？

lines.en: Sure, here you go. Be careful, it's new.
lines.zh: 当然，给你。小心点，这是新的。

lines.en: I will. I promise to return everything after class.
lines.zh: 我会小心的。我保证下课后全部还给你。

lines.en: No rush. We still have art class after this.
lines.zh: 不急。这节之后我们还有美术课。

lines.en: You're always so prepared, Lily. I should learn from you.
lines.zh: 你总是准备得这么充分，莉莉。我应该向你学习。

lines.en: Haha, I just check my bag every night before bed.
lines.zh: 哈哈，我只是每晚睡觉前检查一下书包。
